message:
🐛 fix: use separate --label flags and add good first issue label

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -165,7 +165,10 @@ jobs:
             issue_body=$(printf '## Broken Link Detected

**Broken URL:** [%s](%s)
**Status:** %s
**Found on page:** [%s](%s)
**Hash:** %s

### How to fix
1. Go to the source page listed above
2. Find and update the broken link to a working URL, or remove it if no longer relevant
3. Submit a PR with the fix

---
Auto-generated by [docs-link-checker](https://github.com/kubestellar/infra/actions/workflows/docs-link-checker.yml)' "$url" "$url" "$status" "$source" "$source" "$url_hash")
             gh issue create --repo kubestellar/docs \
               --title "$issue_title" \
-              --label "help wanted,bug,documentation" \
+              --label "help wanted" \
+              --label "good first issue" \
+              --label "bug" \
+              --label "documentation" \
               --assignee copilot \
               --body "$issue_body" || echo "Failed to create issue for $url"
